commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: This is the stone which was despised by you builders, which has become the head of the corner. For there is no other name given to men under heaven in which we must be saved."

commentaries.author: Interlinear Gloss
commentaries.content: And now, I urge you, call to mind Christ’s saying; “When they deliver you up unto the synagogues, take no thought how or what thing you shall speak; for it is the Spirit of your Father which speaketh in you." (Lk 12:11-12)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
